internal_issues.description: WIN-025 finding field carried 2026-architecture tangent instead of strongest available claim (evolution-log admission). Fixed.
Orphaned self-retraction clause in detail_verdict_text. WIN-025 never characterized FSF as empirical. Removed.
SPE/CME mechanism direction backwards in parenthetical. SPE protons penetrate deeper than CME electrons. Fixed.
'Lowest possible frequency' stated as exact assertion rather than first-order heuristic. Reworded to 'lowest plane-parallel axial-mode frequency — a first-order lower bound'.
Out-of-band suppression prediction unquantified. Added '≤30% of ensemble-median in-band signal, consistent with Kim & Chang (2018)'. Fixed.
Binary-classifier collapse not disclosed: 9 stations mostly cluster in 30-50° band → only 2-3 unique predicted values. Added disclosure sentence. Fixed.

Cross-document inconsistency: WIN-061 said standard physics does NOT uniformly predict suppression; W027-PRED-R006 detail_reasoning said standard physics IS consistent with suppression. Fixed by updating W027-PRED-R006 detail_reasoning in predictions.json to match WIN-061's nuanced mixed-direction account.
Kp inconsistency between detail_evidence (Kp ≤ 3 quiet conditions) and detail_extra/FAIL-007 (dome author cited Kp ~4.5). Needs Chernogor & Holub (2024) paper audit. Assigned EXP-238.
WIN-025 c4 H5: architectural disjoint — detail_evidence doesn't introduce scaling equation or BOU anchor before detail_verdict_text concedes them. Requires 2-3 new sentences. Assigned EXP-239.
